subcodes.first_line: O My Afnán! Upon thee be My glory and My loving-kindness. Thy letter hath reached the presence of this Wronged One and the All-Glorious hath presented it [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا افنانی علیک بهائی و عنایتی قد حضر کتابک لدی المظلوم و عرضه المجد فلما
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause, @petitions to authorities, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @praise and encouragement, @call to action
